body.title: D279 companion: cloud escalation monitoring tool
body.result: Already fully implemented: escalation_stats.py parses turn_trace + escalation.log, groups cloud-tier calls by topic keyword, reports this-week vs prev-week delta. 43 tests in test_escalation_stats.py all pass. Tool registered as get_escalation_stats.
body.description: tools/escalation_stats.py — queries turn_traces for cloud-tier calls, groups by topic/keyword, returns this-week vs last-week trend. Log errors to escalation_stats.log. Tests: test_escalation_stats.py. NOT changing: turn_trace schema.
